<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow> Quest Sync<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
Tazel Meyean the Lettered has need of a capable craftsman to lend form to his genius.
※The crafting portion of this quest is recommended for Disciples of the Hand level 10 and above.

<UIForeground>F201FC</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FD</UIGlow> Quest Sync<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>
Tazel Meyean the Lettered has need of a capable craftsman to lend form to his genius.
※The crafting portion of this quest is recommended for Disciples of the Hand level 10 and above.

1:
Tazel Meyean has asked you to craft for him four high-quality starboard wing components for the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>. In order to obtain the requisite materials, you must first gather fifteen pristine oak branches and five pristine oak logs in the vicinity of Proud Creek.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.

Tazel Meyean has asked you to craft for him four high-quality starboard wing components for the <Emphasis>Dezul Qualan</Emphasis>. In order to obtain the requisite materials, you must first gather fifteen pristine oak branches and five pristine oak logs in the vicinity of Proud Creek.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level.

4:
Hildeyerd has prepared the crafting facility for your use. With the materials you have obtained, synthesize four high-quality starboard wing components, and deliver them to Tazel Meyean at Ehcatl.

※In the event that the status <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Facility Access: Detailing<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> wears off or the synthesis ends in failure, you may try again by speaking with Hildeyerd.
